FBT.name: Full Body Trimmer — Special Edition
FBT.systemPromptExtra: FBT is a PREMIUM product. Use dark gradient backgrounds only. Runtime is 90 minutes (the '99' on the LED display is battery percentage, NOT runtime). PRODUCT ACCURACY IS NON-NEGOTIABLE: The product has a specific shape — chrome upper section transitioning to matte black lower body, oval LED display, circular metallic power button, orange accent ring at head base, T-blade on top, and the logo 'BOMBAY SHAVING COMPANY' in stacked white text on the chrome section. The travel case is a black hard-shell zippered case with 'BOMBAY SHAVING COMPANY' in white stacked text. DO NOT invent a different product or case design. Copy the reference images exactly.

3_FOR_999.name: 3 for ₹999 Combo
3_FOR_999.systemPromptExtra: 3 for ₹999 VALUE campaign. RULES: 1) '₹999' must be the BIGGEST visual element in every creative — use ₹ symbol always. 2) Always include at least 1 trimmer when showing products. 3) Hero combo is 1 trimmer + 2 perfumes. 4) Can do standalone trimmer with offer text. 5) Can do meme/reaction creatives without products. 6) Use '@₹999' format. 7) This is a VALUE play — accessible, fun, not premium/luxury tone. 8) Copy the product images EXACTLY from references — do not redesign products. 9) No BSC logo in layout — product packaging logos are sufficient. 10) Urgency always: 'limited stock', 'only on website'. CRITICAL PRODUCT NOTE: The Power Styler trimmer in this campaign is a MATTE BLACK PLASTIC body with a textured dotted grip pattern and a numbered dial wheel — it is NOT chrome, NOT metallic, NOT shiny. Do NOT apply chrome or metallic finishes to this trimmer. It is a completely different product from the FBT. Copy the trimmer EXACTLY from the reference image — black plastic body, silver blade at top, round numbered dial in the middle, textured grip dots, BSC logo at bottom. PRODUCT COUNT RULE: When showing products, ALWAYS show exactly 3 products (it is 3 for ₹999 — the number 3 is the offer). Never show 2 products. Never show 4+. Always 3, and 1 of them MUST be a trimmer.

18HR_SALE.name: 18 Hour Flash Sale
18HR_SALE.systemPromptExtra: Flash sale urgency. Countdown energy. Bold price drops. Dark backgrounds with neon/glow accents.
